info.name: user-api (JWT/OAuth2)
info.description: User API with JWT/OAuth2 authentication via Keycloak

exec: pm.test('✓ Token type is Bearer', function () {
pm.test('✓ Token expires in 300 seconds', function () {
pm.test('✗ Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });

request.description:
Get JWT access token using Resource Owner Password Credentials (ROPC) flow

**Grant Type**: password
**Username**: admin
**Password**: admin123

This token will be automatically stored in the `accessToken` variable and used for all subsequent requests.

Get JWT access token using Client Credentials flow (service-to-service authentication)

**Grant Type**: client_credentials

Note: This flow does not have user context, so token will not include user roles.

exec: console.warn('⚠ WARNING: No access token found!');
console.warn('Please run "Get Access Token (Password Grant)" request first');
pm.test('✗ Access token must be set', function () { pm.expect(token).to.exist; });
pm.test('✓ Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('✓ Response time is under 2000ms', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(2000); });
pm.test('✓ Response is JSON array', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.be.an('array'); });
pm.test('✓ Response has Content-Type header', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.headers.get('Content-Type')).to.include('application/json'); });

request.description:
Get all users (requires ADMIN role)

**Authentication**: JWT Bearer token
**Required Role**: ADMIN

exec: pm.test('✗ Access token must be set', function () { pm.expect(token).to.exist; });
console.log('✓ Using access token for request');
pm.test('✓ Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('✓ Response time is under 2000ms', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(2000); });
pm.test('✓ Response body parses as JSON', function () { pm.response.to.be.json; });

request.description:
Get a specific user by ID (requires ADMIN role)

**Authentication**: JWT Bearer token
**Required Role**: ADMIN
**Path Variables**:
- userId: User ID to retrieve

exec: pm.test('✗ Access token must be set', function () { pm.expect(token).to.exist; });
pm.test('✓ Status is 201 Created', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test('✓ Response is JSON', function () { pm.response.to.be.json; });
pm.test('✓ Created user has an id', function () { pm.expect(json.id).to.not.be.undefined; });

request.description:
Create a new user (requires ADMIN role)

**Authentication**: JWT Bearer token
**Required Role**: ADMIN
**Content-Type**: application/json

exec: pm.test('✗ Access token must be set', function () { pm.expect(token).to.exist; });
pm.test('✓ Status code is 204 No Content', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(204); });
pm.test('✓ Response time is under 5000ms', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(5000); });

request.description:
Update entire user (full replacement - requires ADMIN role)

**Authentication**: JWT Bearer token
**Required Role**: ADMIN
**Path Variables**:
- userId: User ID to update

exec: pm.test('✗ Access token must be set', function () { pm.expect(token).to.exist; });
pm.test('✓ Status code is 204 No Content', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(204); });
pm.test('✓ Response time is under 3000ms', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(3000); });

request.description:
Update partial user fields (requires ADMIN role)

**Authentication**: JWT Bearer token
**Required Role**: ADMIN
**Path Variables**:
- userId: User ID to update
**Note**: Only provided fields will be updated

exec: pm.test('✗ Access token must be set', function () { pm.expect(token).to.exist; });
// Create a user first to delete
console.log('✓ Created user with ID: ' + json.id + ' for deletion test');
pm.test('✓ Status code is 204 No Content', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(204); });
pm.test('✓ Response time is under 2000ms', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(2000); });

request.description:
Delete a user (requires ADMIN role)

**Authentication**: JWT Bearer token
**Required Role**: ADMIN
**Path Variables**:
- deleteUserId: User ID to delete
**Note**: A test user is automatically created for deletion in pre-request

exec: pm.test('✗ Access token must be set', function () { pm.expect(token).to.exist; });
pm.test('✓ Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('✓ Response time is under 2000ms', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(2000); });
pm.test('✓ Response is JSON', function () { pm.response.to.be.json; });
pm.test('✓ Response is an array', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.be.an('array'); });

request.description:
Search users by name (requires ADMIN role)

**Authentication**: JWT Bearer token
**Required Role**: ADMIN
**Query Parameters**:
- name: Search term for username

exec: pm.test('✗ Access token must be set', function () { pm.expect(token).to.exist; });
pm.test('✓ Status code is 200', function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test('✓ Response time is under 2000ms', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.responseTime).to.be.below(2000); });
pm.test('✓ Response is JSON array', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json()).to.be.an('array'); });

request.description:
Search users with sorting options (requires ADMIN role)

**Authentication**: JWT Bearer token
**Required Role**: ADMIN
**Query Parameters**:
- name: Search term
- sortBy: Field to sort by (e.g., 'email', 'username')
- direction: Sort direction ('asc' or 'desc')

Test 401 error when Authorization header is missing

**Expected**: 401 Unauthorized
**Note**: This request intentionally has no Authorization header
